title: Choir Static
text: A chorus of wrong prayers answers whenever the table goes quiet.
flavor: The voices know harmonies no living throat should hold.
trigger: When escalation advances during your turn.
penalty: All players gain 1 Heat unless you take 1 wound to ground the chorus.
relief: Spend 1 charge from a charged artifact to ground the chorus without a wound.
upside: If you take the wound, gain 1 trophy for protecting the crew.
